LanguageData.PM_MegalithHarvest_CommandDesc: Select a center within {0} cells. The Megalith will harvest up to {2} connected resource cells inside a {1}-cell radius.
LanguageData.PM_MegalithAutoHarvestMode_Desc: Switches whether autonomous harvesting may target deep resources. Deep resources do not require a mining designation.
LanguageData.PM_MegalithHarvest_Unavailable: The Megalith cannot harvest in its current state.
LanguageData.PM_MegalithHarvest_Busy: A remote harvest sequence is already in progress.
LanguageData.PM_MegalithHarvest_CoolingDown: Remote harvesting is cooling down for {0} seconds.
LanguageData.PM_MegalithHarvest_InvalidCenter: The harvest center must be within range of the Megalith.
LanguageData.PM_MegalithHarvest_NoResources: No valid connected resources were found in that area.
